productDisplayName: Femella Women Beige Animal Chiffon Smocked Top
description: Style Note femella does chic casual in their trademark uber cool style with these tops. Printed and creatively designed, these tops are wardrobe essentials that we can't do without! Paired with a short pencil skirt and heeled sandals, you'll be dressed to impress. Product Details Cream casual translucent shirt with an animal print, has a mock buttoned placket till the hemline with a ruffle on either side of the placket, a smocked elasticated hemline, a triangular cutout detail at the back with overlaps, sleeveless with a ruffle stitched to the armhole and a round neckline. Material and Care Blended fabric Wash cold with like colours Do not wring or bleach Dry inside out Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
